slides.title: ESP32
slides.description: Leveraged for high-performance applications like AirMonitorPro, focusing on real-time data streaming, dual-core processing, and integrated Wi-Fi/Bluetooth stacks.

slides.title: ESP8266
slides.description: Experienced in interfacing various modules including RFID readers, DHT22 sensors, and custom logic circuits for smart automation.

slides.title: Raspberry Pi 3 Model B+
slides.description: Utilizing Raspberry Pi for higher-level circuit control through Linux-based environments, bridging the gap between software OS and GPIO interaction.

slides.title: Arduino Uno
slides.description: Where it all started. Mastered the fundamentals of circuit design, I2C communication, and human-machine interfaces (LCDs, tactile inputs, and PWM).

proficiencies.title: Protocols & Communication
proficiencies.description: Proficient in I2C, UART, and SPI for chip-to-chip data transfer, as well as MQTT for IoT cloud connectivity.

proficiencies.title: Sensor Interfacing
proficiencies.description: Hands-on experience with environmental sensors (DHT22, GP2Y1014AU), security modules (RFID), and various analog/digital transducers.

proficiencies.title: System Design
proficiencies.description: Skilled in moving from breadboard prototyping to stable, long-term deployments for environmental monitoring.
